meta.title: Vipin Vijayan Nair — Mobile Engineer | iOS, Android, React Native
meta.description: AI Engineer & Lead Software Engineer — 16+ years. Production LLM systems (RAG, Agents, LangGraph, MCP) and iOS/Android/React Native apps used by millions. Staff Design Engineer at Visa.
meta.keywords: Vipin Vijayan Nair, Mobile Developer, iOS, Android, React Native, Flutter, AI Engineer, LLM, RAG, LangGraph, LangChain, OpenAI, Python, FastAPI, Kubernetes, Docker, Software Engineer, Austin TX

hero.name: Vipin Vijayan Nair
hero.description: AI Engineer & Lead Software Engineer with {yearsExperience} years building production-grade software — from multi-agent LLM systems with RAG, LangGraph, and MCP, to native & cross-platform mobile apps shipped to millions. Currently a Staff Design Engineer at Visa, where I combine deep AI engineering with mobile expertise to build intelligent, scalable products.

about.location: Quincy, MA and Austin, Texas, US
paragraphs: I'm an AI Engineer & Staff Design Engineer at Visa with {yearsExperience} years of experience. I build production LLM systems first — multi-agent RAG, LangGraph, MCP, OpenAI, embeddings, retrieval, evaluation, guardrails, and deployment — and I pair that with deep mobile leadership across native iOS, Android, and React Native apps used by millions.
Highlights include retail mobile platforms serving 720K+ shoppers monthly across 420+ store locations, plus leadership across teams, product launches, production support, and AI adoption.

highlights.title: Production at Scale
highlights.text: Apps used by 720K+ shoppers monthly across 420+ retail locations.

highlights.title: Full Lifecycle
highlights.text: From concept and architecture to App Store launch and production support.

highlights.title: Team Leadership
highlights.text: Led offshore engineering teams across multiple time zones.

highlights.title: AI Engineering
highlights.text: Completed the AI Makerspace Bootcamp — RAG, LangGraph agents, MCP, evaluation & guardrails.

highlights.title: Quality First
highlights.text: Strong focus on performance, accessibility, and clean architecture.

certification.title: AI Makerspace Engineering Bootcamp
certification.subtitle: Completed the 14-module AI Engineering Bootcamp and earned the certification.
certification.imageAlt: AI Makerspace AI Engineering Bootcamp Certificate
certification.heading: AI Engineering Bootcamp
highlights: School Assistant demo — an AI-powered chat app for parents to ask natural language questions about school events and programs.
Multi-source retrieval across local files, Gmail, and web search using a multi-agent workflow.
Built with OpenAI GPT-4, FastAPI, React, Qdrant, LangGraph, and RAGAS; deployed on Railway and Vercel.

ai.subheaderText: Models, orchestration, retrieval, evaluation, and production AI systems.

mobile.subheaderText: Platforms, languages, tooling, and integrations used to ship mobile products.

items: Lead engineer for iOS, Android, and React Native retail applications used by 720K+ shoppers monthly across 420+ Stop & Shop locations.
Built native and cross-platform mobile applications with scanner, Bluetooth, and electronic self-checkout features.
Implemented biometric authentication, Wi-Fi auto-connect native modules, and location-based services.
Set up CI/CD pipelines with GitHub, Jenkins, and Fastlane for fast, reliable releases.
Provided technical leadership and production support for retail client engagements.
Developed mobile projects across Android, iOS, Kony, and Titanium for multiple enterprise clients.
Built Michigan University VR apps using Google Cardboard and Oculus SDKs (Android NDK, C++).
Created InjoyGiving — a cross-platform gifting app for iOS and Android with QR-code redemption.
Built the Anthem Healthcare cross-platform payer app on Kony supporting millions of users.
Built Android applications integrated with Toshiba medical devices.
Built English Grammar — the #1 education app on the Play Store in 2013.
Developed a range of educational applications from concept to launch.
Improved app stability by analyzing user behavior and crash reports.
Built iGenApps — a no-code mobile app/website builder used by thousands.
Developed from scratch in Titanium, then ported to native Android and iOS.
Implemented Maps, SMS, Phone, Twitter, Facebook, In-App Purchase, and Push Notifications.
Led game development using Cocos2D, Box2D, and Corona across Android and iOS.

aiProjects.name: School Events RAG — Multi-Agent Capstone
aiProjects.description: Production-style RAG application that helps parents find school events and programs via natural-language questions. A multi-agent system orchestrated by LangGraph routes queries between a local Qdrant vector store of school data and the live web (Tavily) with fallback logic.
features: RecursiveCharacterTextSplitter (1000/200 chunks) — improved recall by 2× over full-doc indexing
Multi-agent orchestration: LocalEvents agent + WebSearch agent with LangGraph routing
Gmail MCP integration — searches parent's Gmail for school emails via Model Context Protocol
FastAPI backend + React frontend, deployable to Railway & Vercel
Designed for production: env-driven config, OAuth, deployment scripts, Docker support

aiProjects.name: Vibe-Coded LLM Chat App
aiProjects.description: My first LLM-powered application — built end-to-end using AI-assisted development ("vibe coding") in Cursor. React frontend + FastAPI backend proxying OpenAI gpt-4.1-mini, deployed to Vercel. The capstone of the AI Engineer Challenge intro course.

learning.title: 14 modules — from prototyping to production
learning.subtitle: Completed the AI Makerspace AI Engineering Bootcamp (Fall 2025 cohort).

tracks.title: Foundations
items: Prototyping Best Practices & Vibe Coding — AI-assisted dev workflow
Embeddings & RAG — vector representations & retrieval
End-to-End RAG — first production-shaped RAG pipeline

tracks.title: Production RAG
items: LCEL & LangGraph with LangChain-powered RAG
Ollama — running local open-source LLMs
Synthetic Data Generation + LangSmith tracing
RAGAS — evaluating RAG & agent quality
Advanced Retrieval — re-ranking & smarter pipelines

tracks.title: Agents
items: First Agent with LangGraph — stateful agentic flows
Multi-Agent Systems — agent orchestration & handoffs
OpenAI Agents SDK — official agents framework
Open Deep Research — deep-research agent patterns

tracks.title: Production & Protocols
items: MCP (Model Context Protocol) — Gmail & tool integration
LangGraph Platform — deployment & scaling
Production RAG & Guardrails — safety, monitoring, reliability

skills.title: Embeddings & vector stores
skills.text: Built, tuned, and persisted embeddings for semantic search.

skills.title: End-to-end RAG pipelines
skills.text: Architected document ingestion, retrieval, and generation flows.

skills.title: Advanced retrieval techniques
skills.text: Dense, sparse, and hybrid search; chunking; reranking; and Maximum Marginal Relevance (MMR) for relevance/latency trade-offs.

skills.title: Multi-agent orchestration
skills.text: Designed and orchestrated multi-agent workflows with LangGraph.

skills.title: Agent integrations
skills.text: Implemented agent patterns and pipelines using LangChain and the OpenAI Agents SDK.

skills.title: Synthetic data & knowledge graphs
skills.text: Generated synthetic datasets and structured knowledge for training and testing.

skills.title: Evaluation & observability
skills.text: Instrumented experiments and evaluated agents/RAG with LangSmith and RAGas.

skills.title: Production RAG patterns
skills.text: Designed deployment-ready architectures addressing scaling, caching, and monitoring.

skills.title: Guardrails & safety
skills.text: Implemented policies, filtering, and runtime controls for safer, auditable model behavior.

skills.title: Performance & caching
skills.text: Applied caching strategies and response-time tuning for production performance.

skills.title: Local model testing
skills.text: Validated models and workflows locally using Ollama.

capstone.title: Capstone: School Events Multi-Agent RAG
capstone.text: End-to-end project combining RAG, multi-agent orchestration with LangGraph, MCP-driven Gmail integration, FastAPI backend, and a React frontend — shipped with Railway + Vercel deployment.

projects.name: Stop & Shop ScanIT
projects.description: Retail mobile and handheld app for in-store shopping — scan items, track a budget, and electronically self-checkout. Deployed across 420+ Ahold banners in the US with 720K+ shopping trips per month.
features: Constant socket connection for in-store devices

projects.name: Stop & Shop Mobile App
projects.description: Coupon and rewards app where shoppers save money by applying digital coupons directly to their loyalty card. Built on React Native with custom native modules.

projects.name: Michigan University VR Apps
projects.description: Virtual reality apps built for the University of Michigan using Google Cardboard and Samsung Gear VR with Oculus SDK. C++ and Android NDK used for low-level VR rendering.

projects.name: Anthem Healthcare Payer
projects.description: Cross-platform healthcare services app for WellPoint (Anthem), one of the largest US health insurers. Built on Kony for both iOS and Android.

projects.name: InjoyGiving
projects.description: Dubai-based unique gifting platform that lets users send personalized gifts anywhere in the world. Each gift generates a unique QR code redeemable at vendors.

projects.name: English Grammar
projects.description: Hit the #1 Education App on the Google Play Store in 2013. Helped thousands of students learn English grammar through interactive practice.

projects.name: iGenApps — App Builder
projects.description: No-code mobile app/website builder that lets users create apps and websites from their smartphone — no programming required.

personalProjects.name: Flutter Themer
personalProjects.description: A web-based tool for theming an entire Flutter app with a live preview. It lets developers copy the generated theme file directly into their project and apply a professional visual system across the app.
features: Live theme preview while you adjust colors and styles
Copy-ready theme file for direct Flutter integration
Built to help teams standardize app-wide styling

contact.title: Looking for a mobile engineer who ships?
contact.description: I'm always interested in new challenges — whether it's leading a mobile team, architecting a greenfield app, or scaling an existing product. Let's talk.
